cpu: AMD A8-3850 APU with Radeon HD Graphics
notes: Proton installs itself and game runs out of the gate. No Proton related issues. Non-Proton Performance Tip: On each game session start zoom out of the campaign map and move mouse to all corners of the minimap, allowing the game to load all textures persistently. Game runs smoother after that.
title: Alea Jacta Est
